stemHtml: Which of the following is correct for an aircraft operating a medical flight, when using the radio?

options.a: PAN PAN MEDICAL before its callsign, has priority over all messages except distress.
options.b: MAYDAY, MAYDAY, MEDICAL before its callsign, has priority over all messages except distress.
options.c: PAN, PAN, PAN before its callsign, has priority over all messages except urgency.
options.d: MAYDAY, MAYDAY, MAYDAY before its callsign, has priority over all messages except urgency.
